name: Backrooms: The Deep Dark
short_description: Backrooms: The Deep Dark is a 4-player cooperative horror game where you will survive in a mysterious scary atmospheric world, wander through unknown dark corners and get scared of every nook and cranny!
detailed_description:
Backrooms: The Deep Dark is a 4-player cooperative horror game where you will survive in a mysterious scary atmospheric world, wander through unknown dark corners and get scared of every nook and cranny!

  • High complexity

  • Creepy Atmosphere

  • Stealth

  • Immersive AI

  • Co-op

  • Incredible design

  • One-Life

    Also for your attention

  • The presence of flickering light, be careful if you have problems with it.

Caution

This game is unique compared to many others that focus on the backrooms concept. It sets itself apart by not simply copying everything detailed within the community. Instead, it carefully integrates specific elements of the backrooms, providing a distinct perspective rather than mirroring the entire concept.

supported_languages:
